title: Roast Earthy Indian Courgettes Curry
description: A flavorful and nutritious Indian-inspired curry featuring roasted courgettes, perfect for a solo dinner. This paleo-friendly dish is earthy, fluffy, and delicious.
instructions: In a bowl, toss the courgette cubes with 1 tablespoon of coconut oil, salt, and black pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
In a large pan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, about 8-10 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the ground cumin and curry powder. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the roasted courgettes, canned coconut milk, and 1/4 cup of water to the pan. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together, about 10-15 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
